expectations.evidence: Starts with '# Investigativna sprava: Zmluvy v CRZ (1. – 7. marec 2026)' with diacritics. Uses numbered sections (1-8) instead of CONFIRMED/INCONCLUSIVE template structure. Uses 'POTVRDENE ZLTE STOPY' instead of 'CONFIRMED'.
SVS Nitra first (1.1), HDH second (1.2), threshold gaming third (1.3). Correct ordering.
Dismissed findings are individual subsections (3.1 through 3.8) with paragraphs, not a single summary table. Each dismissed finding is its own subsection.
Header: '10 332 kontraktov' and '658 911 762,63 EUR'. Also in exec summary.
Mostly faithful to input. Adds SQL query suggestions and methodology section but doesn't invent findings data.
Ends with 'Datasety: zmluvy.zltastopa.sk/data/crz' footer. No 'Dakujeme Zltej Stope'.
